LePIC+ 3D
  • Running Simulations

Running Simulations

Input Files

Typical simulations require:

  • conditions.inp

  • geometry.inp

  • boundary.inp

  • chemistry files

  • magnetic field maps (optional)

MPI Execution

Example:

mpirun -np 4 ./run_min

OpenMP

Example:

export OMP_NUM_THREADS=8
./run_min
